title: 3 Myths About Net Worth Tracking — Busted
description: Think net worth tracking is complicated, only for the wealthy, or not worth your time? All three myths busted. Free Financial Ledger makes it simple. net worth tracker · track net worth · personal finance myths · financial independence · wealth building · net worth
